name: stackra/events
purpose: Attribute-based event listener discovery and broadcasting wiring. Ships #[OnEvent], #[ListensFor], #[AfterCommit], and #[Broadcastable] with channel / name / queue helpers.
when_to_use: Any package needs to declare an event listener or broadcast an event without editing EventServiceProvider.
when_not_to_use: For queue-worker orchestration or job-lifecycle events, use stackra/scheduling and Laravel Horizon.
